---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for ShotFlow
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe how this feature would be used and who would benefit from it. Attach examples, mockups, or references if available.

## Provider / Scope

If this request is related to a specific provider or output type, please specify:

- **Provider**: [e.g., a new provider to add, or an existing one to extend]
- **Output type**: [video / image_set / comic / micro_movie / vn / general]
- **Integration path**: [MCP tool / REST endpoint / workflow SOP / other]

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Would You Be Willing to Contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I can help implement this
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting
- [ ] I can help with testing or documentation
